data: With a common vision, we developed a brand that is reflective of Revogen's innovative and high-quality products that help patients heal.
Made possible by the people thinking of other's need at the time of their loss

We've enjoyed a lengthy partnership with SummitTrek and consider it an honor to create tools for their coaching practice that bring lasting impact in the lives and businesses of their clients. We help communicate on their behalf by way of brand re-design, monthly workbooks, email newsletters, assorted print materials and websites. Summit is in the business of transforming and restoring lives and businesses to their original intended purpose and we love helping them do that.

Summit makes use of carefully curated quotes throughout their materials. When we recently re-designed their brand we made sure to identify a font that felt authentically hand written, to give the personal touch whenever short quotes are displayed.

We've created a comprehensive system of tools, worksheets, workbooks all with a simple minimalistic aesthetic. We never want the design to get in the way of the process or the meaningful exercises the user is experiencing.
One of the most impactful Summit offerings is the Life Planning Retreat. The weekend is an opportunity to Rekindle Your Passions. Discover Your Purpose and Live Differently.
our process is found in restoring leaders and organizations to their original intened purpose through coaching

Medical Solutions of Texas is a Service Disabled Veteran Owned Business (SDVOSB) that acts as the bridge between medical supply companies and the Department of Defense and VA hospitals. They have the connections and experience to help private companies sell their medical suplies and solutions to the government.

MSOT's lacked a brand, identity and website that looked legitimate in the eyes of the medical community or the military end user. So, we developed a brand that was inspired by stenciled and angular military lettering and logistics shipping containers. The brand uses a color palette sampled from camoflauge and carries with it that tactical "we get it done" mentality.
The lettering is distinctive, simple and no nonsense.

The MSOT website is a place for medical supply sales reps to understand how to sell to the government. Pages help the view understand how MSOT helps clarify a complex process. We featured "end users." The ultimate recipients of the  medical care offered and featured them over the lifetime of military service from new recruits, to growing families all the way up to retired and aging combat veterans.
Our websites are always designed and programmed with desktop, laptop, tablet and mobile experiences in mind.
putting while someone else holds a branded flag

After a life-changing experiencing at a Youth Peace Camp in Serbia, founder Shane Hanson knew his purpose was to create a non-profit that served Foster Youth through sports, mentorship, and training. Due to the deeply flawed foster care system,  many children who need safe and secure environments are left with a lack of structure and resources. Freedom Youth Foundation was created to help fill that gap along side a community of amazing volunteers and sponsors. They care for thousands of foster kids each year in California, Idaho and Mexico.
With a brand that has good standing within the communities they serve, it was important to honor the intent of FYF's original logo.
Once a concise look and feel was created, we quickly developed all collateral for their day-to-day operations, marketing, and events.
In a recent fundraising event, we donated our services to create branded and marketing materials for a golf tournament.
branded signs for each golf hole
hero image of putting with flag
parachuting pair of kids having a great time
Reddoor partnered with Young Life to create a Salesforce-based compliance management system for employees and volunteers worldwide.

Backend software development and integration was completed by Young Life. The YL Connect tool is a decade(s) overdue update to managing thousands of employees and volunteers. Everything from training, to background checks to on-going education and compliance. Our goal was to create an experience that made the required and mundane tasks enjoyable and as easy as possible to accomplish.
Specific pages, shown in mobile format that a typical user would experience in the process of using the app.

We took every opportunity we could to infuse the trademark life-giving enthusiasm that Young Life is known for. We used candid pictures of student, staff and volunteers throughout the experience to emphasize the human element and importance of the mission of Young Life.
Reddoor partnered with Young Life to create a Salesforce-based compliance management system for employees and volunteers worldwide.

LoneHollow Ranch (LHR) is a beautiful, Texas ranch and retreat property operated by Young Life in Utopia, Texas. Our engagement with LHR began as a consultation on how to position the ranch as a possible venue for retreats and celebrations.

LHR is occupied most of the summer and sporadically throughout the rest of the year, but goal was to position LoneHollow as a destination for student, adult and school retreats or even for weddings, big gatherings or a remote adventure camp. LoneHollow Ranch has it all and can accommodate groups from 50-500.
“Welcome to your home away from home.”
The headquarters building at LHR welcomes you with it’s distinctive pillars, which serves as inspiration in the letterform shape for the ranch’s logotype.
A galvanized on corten steel signage system was designed to help guests find their way around the sprawling ranch.
We created an easy to use, illustrated map to make simple sense of the the massive property. Simiplification and ease of use were the priority.

We developed a series of brochures and digital presentations that spoke directly to the specific needs of different customer types: Leadership Retreats, Celebrations, Adult Retreats and Student Retreats.

A testament to the transformational power of the place. LHR welcomes groups to have one of the most meaningful weekends or weeks of their lives. It was important to feature the beauty of the place along with the amenities and the flexibility that the ranch offers to serve a diverse customer base.
An improved website experience for a dental referral service.

1-800-DENTIST is a fixture in the dental space, with over 25,000 dentists in their referral network. We created a compelling website to guide patients towards making the best decision for their dental health.
With a common vision, we developed a brand that is reflective of Revogen's innovative and high-quality products that help patients heal.
